*Issues found:* 16 total (Critical: 3, Moderate: 8, Trivial: 1, Auto-resolved: 4)
*Tickets created:* 10 new | 0 duplicates skipped | 4 auto-resolved (not ticketed)
*Incident mode:* No (16 ≤ 20 threshold)

*Auto-Resolved (4):* — error condition no longer present in codebase
- :white_check_mark: *ReferenceError: linksOpen is not defined* (MIT-MAP-2D) — `linksOpen` has no matches anywhere in `src/`; variable removed from SubmitForm.
- :white_check_mark: *ReferenceError: ChevronDown is not defined* (MIT-MAP-2C) — `ChevronDown` is not imported in any submit form component; resolved in current code.
- :white_check_mark: *ReferenceError: verifiedBrands is not defined* (MIT-MAP-2B) — `verifiedBrands` has no matches anywhere in `src/`; variable removed.
- :white_check_mark: *ReferenceError: verifiedBrands is not defined* (MIT-MAP-2A) — Same as 2B, duplicate on different route pattern.

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-1J|column brands.founder does not exist>*
Events: 158 · New · Severity: Critical
Apply the missing DB migration to add `brands.founder` column, or remove it from the query in `brands.ts:614`.
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-896/fix-missing-brandsfounder-column-causing-homepage-500-errors|DEV-896> — Fix missing `brands.founder` column causing homepage 500 errors · Priority: Urgent · Labels: Bug, L

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-1B|column brands.brand_highlights does not exist>*
Events: 111 · New · Severity: Critical
Apply the missing DB migration to add `brands.brand_highlights` column, or remove it from the query in `brands.ts:615` — likely the same batch as `founder`.
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-897/fix-missing-brandsbrand-highlights-column-causing-homepage-500-errors|DEV-897> — Fix missing `brands.brand_highlights` column causing homepage 500 errors · Priority: Urgent · Labels: Bug, L

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-29|CurationJobParams export missing from admin/operations/actions.ts>*
Events: 47 (119 total) · Recurring · Severity: Critical
Fix the Turbopack Server Actions bundler failure — either change to `import type` on the jobs page side, or import `CurationJobParams` directly from `curation-jobs.ts` instead of through `actions.ts`.
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-898/fix-curationjobparams-not-exported-from-adminoperationsactionsts|DEV-898> — Fix `CurationJobParams` not exported from `admin/operations/actions.ts` · Priority: Urgent · Labels: Bug, L

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-1C|DB column 42703 error on homepage (regressed)>*
Events: 13 (21 total) · Recurring · Severity: Moderate
Investigate which column in the homepage brands query is missing — likely a third column from the same schema drift batch; cross-reference with DEV-896/897.
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-899/investigate-regressed-db-column-42703-error-on-homepage-recurring|DEV-899> — Investigate regressed DB column 42703 error on homepage · Priority: High · Labels: Bug, M

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-2H|Server Components render error on production homepage>*
Events: 3 · New · Severity: Moderate
Cross-reference with `digest` value and resolve alongside DEV-896/897 — likely a downstream symptom of the DB column schema drift hitting production.
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-902/investigate-production-server-components-render-failure-on-homepage-no|DEV-902> — Investigate production Server Components render failure on homepage · Priority: High · Labels: Bug, M

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-2N|Module not found: Can't resolve 'adm-zip'>*
Events: 3 · New · Severity: Moderate
Run `pnpm install` or add `adm-zip` to `serverExternalPackages` in `next.config` to resolve the Turbopack bundler failure on the admin route.
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-901/fix-adm-zip-module-not-found-error-in-mit-registryts-crashing|DEV-901> — Fix `adm-zip` module not found error in `mit-registry.ts` · Priority: High · Labels: Bug, M

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-2J|NotFoundError: Brand not found: warmwood-living>*
Events: 6 combined (MIT-MAP-2J + MIT-MAP-2K) · New · Severity: Moderate
Make the dashboard brand lookup return null/redirect instead of throwing when slug is missing from DB; `warmwood-living` is a test slug that doesn't exist in production data.
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-900/fix-unhandled-notfounderror-for-warmwood-living-brand-on-dashboard|DEV-900> — Fix unhandled NotFoundError for `warmwood-living` brand on dashboard · Priority: High · Labels: Bug, M

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-2G|TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'rest')>*
Events: 4 combined (MIT-MAP-2G + MIT-MAP-2F) · New · Severity: Moderate
Fix `getBrands` to return a typed object in all cases on the `feat/dev-750-search-quality` branch — guard against undefined before destructuring `{ rest }`.
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-903/fix-typeerror-cannot-read-properties-of-undefined-reading-rest-on|DEV-903> — Fix TypeError: undefined.rest on brands listing page · Priority: High · Labels: Bug, M
